It doesn't on the suspension bridge
I think its bugged
ay1

I realize this is almost 4 years old at this point, so I'm not knocking it, but it's definitely worth pointing out that the video is extremely poor quality - very fuzzy, lots of warping as you move, a bit of motion sickness. If they could upgrade this with better quality 3D video it would be outstanding.

I realize I'm not the target audience here because I don't have a fear of heights at all (I actually like heights) but I'm curious about use cases like this so I gave it a shot. I particularly liked the heliski one. I didn't really feel like the levels in general got significantly scarier as you progress, and they are all VERY brief. So yeah I feel like something like Richie's Plank Experience might be a more modern offering for exposure therapy for heights, but this is potentially a lot more valuable, because of the level concept and the different environments. They just need to update the video.

For people complaining about how you can't get the controller to work - you have to go into the settings and shut off the Gear VR thing.

reviews.review_title: Ok. Though I don’t have a fear of height
reviews.review_description: I don’t have a fear of heights just wanted to see the videos and they were cool but not the best quality.
I'm not sure about all the negative reviews... I'll agree the scenes are as clear as the screenshots are,  but all in all pretty cool experience.
Very cool app! Works great on the Go!

Poor App, Not great as Rilix roller coaster
Makes you take your fear of heights to new limits. They should make more games that make you overcome other phobias. Maybe arachnophobia  or claustrophobia lol
This is very outdated and not worth downloading in my opinion.
How to use the controls is a mystery for me: I got the main menu displayed but I'm unable neither to start anything not to exit the application :-(

It's a great concept. I know I'm not afraid of heights as I have had a few jobs during from over 100 feet high so I'm not sure if that's why this isn't effective for me. Id like to see someone who actually is afraid of heights to try it out and let me know. The experience scores you based on how often you look up. I can look down with zero effect on my mind. Really nice photos and video in the app. Worth a try by everyone for sure

I really thought this would be a great experience based on reviews 
I read, but I was VERY disappointed.  As you progress through each scenario, you’re constantly stopped and asked about your level of fear.  Takes away from the experience.  I wouldn’t waste your time downloading this one.
It's just boring and stupid. The controls are garbage.

It’s not bad but for a free app but it’s not great either. If the graphics were more clear and less blurry that might add to the experience, also less talking from the woman. Good job it’s free is all I’m saying.
